items.title: ‘I will know every victim,’ says mayor of close-knit Tumbler Ridge.
Canada Launched Major Gun Reforms in 2020 After Its Deadliest Mass Shooting
items.description: The country’s deadliest mass shooting, in Nova Scotia, led to the creation of a comprehensive program after 23 people died, including the attacker.
